title: Sync People, Phone and Email Columns
excerpt: Request to enable linking of Phone and Email columns with a People column such that a change in the People column will reflect as a change to the phone number and email displayed in the linked columns.

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml: Request to enable linking of Phone and Email columns with a People column such that a change in the People column will reflect as a change to the phone number and email displayed in the linked columns.
